use_cases: Display nested file/folder structures with expand/collapse functionality
Create multi-level navigation menus for hierarchical content organization
Build organizational charts and team directory views
Implement settings panels with collapsible grouped options
Show product categories or taxonomies in e-commerce applications
ai_summary: A collapsible hierarchical tree component for displaying nested data structures with folder/file icons, single and multi-select capabilities, and smooth expand/collapse animations. Built with Radix UI for accessibility and motion/react for polished transitions. Supports keyboard navigation, custom indentation, and multiple visual variants for different use cases.
